description_long: This is a traditional Japanese katana sword featuring a long, gently curved single-edged blade with a sharp point. The blade is metallic and highly polished, reflecting light with a smooth, silvery sheen. The handle is elongated, wrapped in a dark material with a visible diamond-pattern grip, and capped with a flat pommel. A small, round guard (tsuba) separates the blade from the handle, finished in a contrasting metallic tone. The overall design is sleek and balanced, with no visible ornamentation or engravings. The sword is visually striking and appears functional, suitable for display or practical use.
description: A sleek, curved Japanese katana with a polished blade, dark wrapped handle, and a simple round guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade, handle, and round guard.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the octagonal shape of the guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the full profile of the blade and handle.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the blade tip, emphasizing the blade's sharpness and handle alignment.
attribute_handle_design: long, straight, wrapped grip with diamond pattern and flat pommel
